DESCRIPTION: You know that feeling you get on vacation, when you’re standing on the beach at dusk? Your skin is still salty and warm, the air is starting to cool, and anything seems possible. That’s Glossier You Soie. A skin-scent enhancing sensual and creamy solar fragrance. Bright, cool Bergamot opens into a blend of Rice Milk, Tiare Water and Evening Jasmine, grounded by a warm, musky base of Ambrox that wears close to skin—so it smells a little different on everyone!

Glossier You is a soft, warm and familiar skin-scent enhancing fragrance. Sparkling Pink Pepper opens into earthy Iris, settling into a strong, slightly-sweet base of Ambrette and Ambrox that wears close to skin–so it smells a little different on everyone!

Going somewhere beachy? Don’t forget to pack these. Glossier You Soie wraps your skin in a sensual, creamy scent that captures the feeling of watching the sun disappear into the ocean. Futuredew gives your skin a soft, sun-kissed glow, like emerging from the water at golden hour.

Get the best of both worlds with this skin-scent enhancing fragrance set. Spritz Glossier You Soie for a sensual and creamy impact or our classic Glossier You for a little something more familiar. Depending on your mood, wear them solo or layered together for a silky, seaside-inspired signature.

Your spring harvest has officially arrived. Keep your lips soft and hydrated through the in-between months with this curated trio of perfectly pink balms: Rose Balm Dotcom, Strawberry Balm Dotcom and Wild Fig Balm Dotcom. Subtle, sweet and totally in-season, they’re made to wear solo, layered together or shared with your best friends!

A skincare–makeup hybrid that’s a one-step shortcut to the glow of a 12-step routine. Think instant dewy, sun-kissed glow, plus smoother-looking texture with continued use. Packed with hydrating heavy-hitters, nourishing oils, and powerful plant-based extracts, it leaves skin gleamy, well-moisturized, and visibly brighter for up to 12 hours.

Glossier You Doux is a soft and serene woody fragrance that opens with Sweet Violet, followed by a precious blend of woody Palo Santo, Frankincense and smoky Myrrh—heightened by a warm, musky base driven by Ambrox. Doux is a skin-scent enhancer that wears close to the skin and true to you, never overpowering your unique scent—because you are the final ingredient.

Inspired by the flexible formula of mustache pomade, Boy Brow visibly defines, thickens and shapes for face-framing brows in seconds. A creamy, conditioning formula and a precision brush coats even the smallest and finest hairs for a soft, flexible hold that won’t stiffen or flake. Available in a range of subtly-tinted shades that seamlessly blend in with your natural hairs plus Clear (that won’t leave a trace).
Our cult-favorite, do-everything lip balm. Swipe on for hydration you can feel and taste with a formula rich in antioxidants and natural emollients to nourish dryness.
Our cult-favorite, do-everything lip balm. Swipe on for hydration you can feel and taste with a formula rich in antioxidants and natural emollients to nourish dryness.
A creamy, medium-coverage lip pencil that enhances your natural shape and tone. Available in an array of true-to-lip, nipple-matched shades.

A limited edition keepsake fragrance set featuring Glossier You Fleur in a 50ml bottle and an 8ml Travel Spray. One to apply before you leave the house and another to slip into a clutch for touch-ups on the go. This kit is packaged in a collectible and highly-giftable holiday tin inspired by a paint bucket, going back to our design and utilitarian roots.

An airy and luminous floral blend that opens with a textured Mineral Salt Accord, followed by a heart of Osmanthus, Ylang Ylang, Apricot Skin and Cashmeran. Complete with a warm, musky base driven by Ambrox. Fleur is a skin-scent enhancer that wears close to the skin and true to you, never overpowering your unique scent—because you are the final ingredient.

Glossier You Rêve is a lush, dreamy gourmand fragrance that opens with rich Buttercream, followed by an addictive center of Plum Butter, Toasted Almond, Iris and creamy white Sandalwood—heightened by a warm, musky base driven by Ambrox. Rêve is a skin-scent enhancer that wears close to the skin and true to you, never overpowering your unique scent—because you are the final ingredient.

A collection of seamless cheek colors in both blush and bronzer shades inspired by golden hour sunsets, so natural it’s like your skin made it. Easy to wear and apply, each shade is sheer enough to blend and layer without going overboard.

A collection of seamless cheek colors in both blush and bronzer shades inspired by golden hour sunsets, so natural it’s like your skin made it. Easy to wear and apply, each shade is sheer enough to blend and layer without going overboard.

Cocoon your lips with this luxe, one-step lipstick. Formulated with the rich moisture of a balm, the sheen of a gloss and the buildable color of a lip tint, this staple is bound to be your new obsession.
A comfortable lip gloss with a glassy finish and just the right amount of sticky. The applicator delivers instant shine with one swipe.
Shape and define brows with a 2-in-1 custom tip shape offering a precision edge for hair-like flicks and flat edge to fill sparse areas.

A playful, sheer fragranced hair and body mist designed to be experimented with, layered, and spritzed throughout the day as a quick scent escape and refresh. Available in three iconic scents. Please note: Lilyhaze Body Spritz is intended for use on the body only.

A supercharged cream that helps you keep moisture on hand. The palm-sized pod with a 360º easy-to-squeeze curve and click-to-close cap makes moisturizing on the go quick and convenient, while securing against spills. The fast-absorbing formula nourishes dry skin without ever getting greasy and uses a “second skin” matrix to lock in moisture.

A trial-sized collection featuring four of our Glossier You fragrances: You, Doux, Reve, and Fleur. The Glossier You Collection is a collection of skin-scent enhancers that are designed to be layered and played with.

A limited edition mini trio featuring two reimagined Ultralip shades–Pony+ is a shimmery rosy taupe and Villa+ is a shimmery dusty rose. Plus, say hello to all new Trophy, a clear gold shimmer lip topper you can wear solo or layered with the other shades. Each ultra-sheer color flatters all skin tones with a soft tint and are perfect for any holiday outing. The best part? They all come nestled in a collectible, giftable and reusable pack inspired by artist’s tins.

Celebrate the season in color with this holiday-exclusive blush trio. Inside, you’ll find three new Mini Cloud Paints. All with the same dewy, buildable formula you love, including Afterglow, a berry with champagne shimmer, Glisten, a terracotta with gold shimmer and Crimson, a mid-tone mauve. The set comes in a giftable, collectible box perfect for storing art supplies or little keepsakes!

2024 Allure Best of Beauty Award-Winner. Refillable, pit-friendly and aluminum-free, our deo features a skin-conditioning Coconut Oil base and moisturizing ingredients like Superfruit Elderberry Extract, Magnesium Hydroxide and Potato Starch that keep you smelling great and feeling dry all day. Formulated without aluminum, baking soda, exfoliating acids or water—aka things that can cause bad odor, disrupt the skin’s pH level and cause irritation—our Deodorant keeps it gentle (but mighty!) with ingredients that work for every underarm.

Light up and wind down with some of our signature Glossier scents. Made with a vegan, non-paraffin wax blend of soy and coconut, our candles have a burn time of up to 45 hours. The best part? Once it’s burnt through, you can reuse the glass vessel to store makeup, pencils or whatever your heart desires!

A fragrance-free, buildable, sheer-matte lipstick with a perfectly diffused flush of color. Inspired by the makeup artist trick of blotting lipstick after application, one swipe glides on smooth and even (no mirror needed!) for a buildable, soft-edged, just-kissed look. Give your natural lips a little something extra, with shades Malt, Fuzz, Cake, and Leo, or go for vivid Punch, Zip, Jam and Crush to really grab the attention.

A refreshing everyday essential for a sheer-glaze of color and lightweight, non-sticky shine. Its nourishing formula melts instantly on the lips, delivering long-lasting care and up to 12-hour hydration for smoother-looking lips. Wear it on its own or layered with your favorite lip products.
Our iconic Glossier You fragrance, now in a fast absorbing, luxurious body crème with a soft, silky, delicately scented finish.

If you wear nothing else today, wear this lip. Whether it’s your birthday suit, business suit, or somewhere in between, G Suit is all you need to feel dressed up with its soft buttery formula, demi-matte finish, and opaque coverage in one swipe. The luxurious formula floats over lips and remains comfortable and flexible throughout wear, while a rich emollient oil blend keeps pigment from sinking into lips for a smooth, soft-focus effect. Chic, polished, and here to be noticed, it’s the perfect addition to your lip wardrobe. Available in nine made-to-be-noticed shades.
A pillowy-soft powder blush that blends and builds seamlessly for a soft-matte flush. Available in a wide range of colors inspired by New York City sunsets.
Treat your lips to a trio of our moisturizing lip balms with our original, cult-favorite formula. Pick any three tubes to satisfy your shade and flavor preferences.

Say hello to the ultimate Glossier routine. Four favorites to keep in your vanity or handbag. Balm Dotcom for instant nourishment with addictive taste. Skin-scent enhancing Glossier You Travel Spray for a signature scent on-the-go Cloud Paint for a sunset-inspired, buildable flush and Boy Brow for perfectly groomed brows.
Pucker up to this limited edition lip combo. Start by lining your lips with our seamless enhancing pencil, Lip Line, and finish off the look with a few swipes of our nourishing Balm Dotcom.
A trio of our skin-scent enhancing floral fragrances in a pocket-friendly format. Each sharing the same warm, musky base note, they’re perfect for layering or wearing solo.

Your favorite Beauty Bag, reimagined for your Earbuds in a cute, silicone keychain case. Perfect for clipping them on your jeans, gym bag or anything in between. Works best with Apple Airpods Pro 1 and 2.

This bag is the ultimate home for your beauty routine. It’s tall enough to fit all of your essentials (even full-size skincare!), but still easily slips into your tote. The coated cotton material means you won’t have to worry about spills or splashes, with a removable snap-button interior pouch, and plenty of extra pockets to keep you organized—so you’re never stuck digging for your favorite products.

Small but mighty, this beloved bag keeps all your can’t-leave-home-without-them essentials within reach. With one main compartment and a zipper closure, the Mini Beauty Bag allows you to experience the convenience of our classic Beauty Bag wherever you may go. Now in two fun colors—iconic red and soft pink.

A daily moisture barrier recovery cream perfect for very dry and/or sensitive skin. The buttery, cocooning cream formulated with plant-based moisture magnets, Glycerin and Cupuaçu Butter, helps dry skin bounce back and lock in hydration for up to 24 hours. Awarded the National Eczema Association Seal of Acceptance™

Escape into luxury with the Body Hero you love, in a transportive dry-touch mist. With an intoxicating Orange Blossom Neroli scent, this ultra-fine body oil packed with Sea Fennel Extract and a blend of three antioxidant-rich oils—Sunflower Seed, Grapeseed, and Oat—instantly moisturizes while smoothing and evening skin tone and improving all over radiance. The formula absorbs fast with zero residue, stickiness, or awkward naked dry-down time (so you can put your clothes on quicker). Plus, the sparkling, subtle aroma lingers just enough for that just-got-back-from vacation scent and glow.

Glossier You, the ultimate personal fragrance, in the ultimate personal format—a refillable, pocket and travel-friendly, solid compact. The solid formula is softer and more intimate, with an alcohol-free, anhydrous wax base that quite literally melts into skin and holds the fragrance close, almost like it’s a part of you. Instead of being surrounded by a cloud of scent, you get friendly reminders throughout the day when you catch a whiff of your wrist or neck of your sweater—creamy, warm, sparkling notes of ambrox, ambrette, musk, iris root and pink pepper.

A gentle body cleanser that provides a deeply nourishing wash, free from soap and sulfates. Its unique oil formula transforms into a milky lather when mixed with warm water, leaving the skin feeling soft and hydrated. Now available in two iconic scents.

A body lotion that does more than just moisturize. Now available in two iconic scents, this daily essential deeply nourishes skin while providing a subtle, healthy-looking glow. No pesky residue or dry-down time. Just a silky, lightweight lotion in a click-lock pump bottle for convenience and ease of use.

A creamy, long-wearing eyeliner pencil that glides on smoothly with rich, buildable, blendable color, supplying endless options for creative expression. Go bold or get subtle with demi-matte, dense pigments for crisp, true color that won’t rub, tug or transfer. This soft (but never too soft!) formula goes on in seconds and easily creates a sharp, defined line, with just enough dry-down time to blend it out for a diffused, smokey look—if that’s what you’re after.

A lightweight, buildable moisturizer that instantly brings out the best in all skin types. It hydrates, visibly evens skin texture, and minimizes the look of pores—while priming skin for gorgeous makeup application.

A multi-benefit, 360° eye cream that tackles the concerns you care about most—immediately hydrating for up to 24 hours and depuffing while visibly brightening dark circles and smoothing the look of fine lines. Our unique lightweight, gel-cream texture (less likely to cause milia!) is fit for under eyes, on eyelids and along the orbital bone for overall fresher, brighter-looking eyes.
Choose your own adventure with 2 Cloud Paints of your choice. Wear them alone or tap into your inner artist and mix or layer together for a custom look.

Our best-selling mascara visibly lengthens and lifts lashes for a baby extensions effect. More: ‘Your lashes look good’ than ‘your mascara looks good’. The weightless, flexible formula will give you natural-looking lift and length with teeny-tiny fibers that coat each individual lash from root to tip for maximum definition. Come for better-looking lashes, stay for the long-wearing, water-resistant (not waterproof) formula that stays in place for up to 12 hours—without smudging or flaking*. *Tested on Lash Slick in Black only.

An 89% skincare-based, gel-cream foundation that leaves skin looking moisturized with a natural-to-you finish. Formulated to fuse with skin (never cake on-top), to blend seamlessly and wear up to 12 hours.

The same concealer you know and love, now available in 32 foundation-matching shades. Buildable coverage formulated to camouflage skin realities like dark circles, blemishes, and redness—but always look like skin with a dewy glowy finish.

An essential duo featuring our skincare-based gel-cream Stretch Fluid Foundation and our buildable, blendable Stretch Balm Concealer. With a natural-to-you finish, these two work together to create a seamless base for any look.

Meet your newest cozy companion for morning dog walks, coffee runs, or looking great on WFH video calls. Our Original Pink Hoodie comes with all the special comfy touches: plush material, pillow-soft fleecy inside, metal-tipped drawstrings, and a relaxed, oversized fit (generous and long; we recommend taking your true size).

A skin-loving liquid highlighter for pearlescent radiance. Infused with Complexion-Inspired Micro Pearls, this buildable formula delivers long-lasting radiance that is non-sticky, non-tacky and never streaky.

An undetectable wash of color that evens out skin’s appearance but won’t hide your freckles, cake your pores, or cover you up. The ultra-thin, breathable formula leaves you with a smooth, dewy finish that lets your skin shine through. Diamond Powder gives a brightening, soft-focus effect and minimizes the appearance of pores, while Glycerin acts as a moisture lock to attract hydration. Comes in 12 super sheer shades.

A brush specially designed to work with Wowder for a smooth, natural finish. With soft and fluffy, perfectly dense bristles, the silky synthetic fibers pick up the exact amount of Wowder you need—never too little, never too much. Plus, it’s the perfect size for all types of powder application: fluffy enough to apply all-over *and* tapered and nimble enough for targeted areas (like under the eyes and around your nose). Comes with a hygienic travel pouch.

The curved shape glides across the contours of your face for an easy, streak-free finish. With short, dense, super-soft bristles for buffing, a targeted tip for those hard-to-blend areas, and swivel cover—it’s your new grab-and-go-to face brush.

A long-wearing, liquid-to-powder eyeshadow with a diffused, soft-matte effect. The silky, blendable tints melt into skin and dry to a sheer, cloud-like powder finish (without the mess and fallout of powder). Just one dab of the doe foot applicator adds depth and dimension to your eyes, while more layers give you a refined, on-trend splash of color. Available in seven shades inspired by the dreamy horizons of Southwest skies. Just tap, swipe, and blend.

A nourishing and transformative gel-balm cleanser that gently dissolves makeup, SPF and impurities. Massage onto dry skin, add water to emulsify and rinse or gently wipe away with a clean, damp cloth for a soft and hydrated canvas.

An easy-to-use, brush-tip black liquid eyeliner that lets literally anyone apply like an expert. The densely-pigmented, buildable formula dries quickly, doesn’t smudge, budge, or drag, and stays put for up to 12 hours. The unique internal ball shaker lets the formula flow through evenly (like pouring your favorite drink into a fancy glass) for a smooth line, every time.

Our brush-tip detailing pen is the most natural-looking way to fill and define your brows. Use it to add oomph to your arch, extend the tail, or add depth to sparse spots with feather-like strokes that fit right in with your real hair. Comes in three sheer shades that won’t disappear or smear: Blond, Brown, and Black.

A lightweight, nourishing serum formulated with 5% Vitamin C derivative and Magnesium PCA. These ingredients team up to even skin tone, improve the appearance of dark spots, and replenish moisture for recharged, refreshed and glowy skin.

A fast-absorbing, super refreshing serum with a soothing combo of 2% Hyaluronic Acid Complex and Pro-Vitamin B5. Beneath the skin, this one-two punch gets to work, deeply hydrating on multiple layers for a visibly smooth, soft (and never sticky) canvas.

A daily vitamin and mineral duo of Zinc PCA and 5% Niacinamide (the perfect amount to be effective without irritating skin). This double dose nourishes skin for visibly smoother texture, smaller-looking pores, and improved clarity.
Introducing an illuminating duo like no other: Futuredew in two versatile formats. Use the oil-serum hybrid for a glowing base, and a travel-friendly solid stick for easy, targeted highlights.
Sweeten your space with this 10th anniversary exclusive candle, inspired by our beloved Birthday Balm Dotcom flavor and housed in a custom-molded glass jar with a chrome finish.

A duo curated for a dewy, dimensional glow. Add a little flush to your face with our best-selling Cloud Paint blush, then top it off with a few swipes of our gleamy, oil-serum illuminating stick, Futuredew Solid.

Whether you’re a retinol rookie or regular, this one’s for you. Universally loved, Pro-Retinol improves the appearance of fine lines, blemishes, pores, dark spots, uneven tone and texture (aka basically everything), while nourishing skin. Formulated with 0.5% pro-retinol (Retinyl Sunflowerates), an innovative hybrid of pure retinol and sunflower seed fatty acids, you get all the juicy benefits of a retinoid, with none of the downsides (irritation, dryness, peeling, etc).

A case for your refillable Deodorant. Re-up on your signature scent or pop a new one into this refillable case. Available in three signature scents (Sandstone, Glossier You and Orange Blossom Neroli) plus Unscented, our refillable deodorant will outdo any odor.

2024 Allure Best of Beauty Award-Winner. A recyclable refill for your Deodorant case. Re-up on your signature scent or pop in a new one. Formulated without aluminum, baking soda, exfoliating acids or water—aka things that can cause bad odor, disrupt the skin’s pH level and cause irritation—our Deodorant keeps it gentle (but mighty!) with ingredients that work for every underarm. Available in three signature scents (Sandstone, Glossier You and Orange Blossom Neroli) plus Unscented, these refill sticks will outdo any odor.

A daily skin-perfecting exfoliator that transforms the look and feel of your complexion by gently “ungluing” dull, dead skin and sweeping it away. With everyday use, a 10% blend of exfoliating acids help improve the appearance of uneven texture, visibly reduce the look of blemishes, and refine the appearance of enlarged pores for smoother, softer, glowier-looking skin.

This soft, glistening eyeshadow creates a sheer, shimmering veil of color—locking onto lids and lasting all day without creasing. Ultrafine pigments float through a buttery base for a silky, blendable formula that swipes on seamlessly and maintains its pretty, glistening look long after it settles. Available in 8 shades with different pearls, flecks, and special effects for the lit-from-within, multi-dimensional glow of your dreams.

Our ergonomically-designed, no-mess body scrub bar fits in the palm of your hand and sloughs away dead skin and dryness to reveal baby-smooth skin. Finely-milled, biodegradable Bamboo Powder provides powerful (yet never painfully powerful) scrub action that exfoliates for skin that feels instantly softer and smoother. Sunflower Seed Oil and Aloe Leaf juice lock in moisture, so you’ll never feel that stripped soapy feeling, while Orange Blossom Neroli Blend adds the fresh, sparkling scent of pear, mandarin, and cypress. Don’t forget to inhale, exhale, and relax for an instant shower (or bubble bath) upgrade.

The solid refill of our ultimate personal fragrance, Glossier you. The solid formula is softer and more intimate, with an alcohol-free, anhydrous wax base that quite literally melts into skin and holds the fragrance close, almost like it’s a part of you. Instead of being surrounded by a cloud of scent, you get friendly reminders throughout the day when you catch a whiff of your wrist or neck of your sweater—creamy, warm, sparkling notes of ambrox, ambrette, musk, iris root and pink pepper.
Keep your essentials in prime condition with this eye + lip liner sharpener featuring a German-engineered blade for smooth, precise lines every time.

Extra-plush and cut for a relaxed, slightly oversized fit, our Terrazzo Hoodie is back for a limited time. Like our other hoodies, it features a super-soft, fleecy inside, our signature Glossier logo on the front, and a subtle speckled pattern.

Inspired by all the things we love about summer (evening walks, beach bonfires, city rooftops…shall we continue?), our iconic Embroidered Hoodie is now available in a limited-edition cream colorway. Like our other hoodies, it’s plush and cozy with a super-soft, fleecy inside, an embroidered Glossier logo on the front, and a pink and red G-logo patch on the sleeve. We know, a hoodie for the summer sounds…hot but this time around, we wanted to create something for those slightly-chilly evenings when you want to stay outside just a little bit longer.
Enjoy a sip of instant joy with this stackable Glossier pink ceramic mug, featuring our logo and Three Eyed Smiley. Ideal for tea, coffee or storing your favorite makeup products!

Here’s the story: originally made for our team at Glossier HQ (because our offices can get pretty chilly), then everyone started asking for them. So, we made more. With a classic crewneck, raglan sleeves, and super soft, plush fleece interior—it feels like something you’ve worn (and loved) forever. Plus, now we can all match!

Big enough to cuddle under, cozy enough to want to keep all to yourself. Our 100% cotton knitwear blanket (originally a holiday gift for the gTEAM!) is back for all your lounging needs. This super soft (and never itchy) blanket will be loved by you and your pets.

Flaunt both storage and style with this sturdy, strapped canvas bag embossed with Glossier’s birthplace and year— New York, New York, 2014. Carry all and carry on with seven durable pockets for products, personal belongings and everything in between.

Meet your new go-to gym bag, long-weekend satchel, carry-everything, chic-and-sporty duffle. It comes equipped with a single main compartment, two interior pockets, a side pocket, and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap. A desert rose colorway, with a sand-colored bag, peach straps and burgundy Glossier logo.
Say hello to our brand new caps! An everyday staple featuring a pre-curved visor and an embroidered design. Available in two variations.

A (refillable!) monochromatic eyeshadow trio in three buildable powder finishes (matte, satin, metallic). Each finish glides on smooth, with minimal fallout or creasing, and can be worn alone or together for monochromatic dimension and choose-your-own-adventure intensity. Matte is a rich, smooth, versatile option. Satin has a soft, delicate sheen. And metallic has a hint of sparkle for a dreamy, shimmering effect. Select your signature shade from 10 curated color stories—inspired by hues found in nature.

Choose your blush adventure with this playful duo. Our soft-matte powder Cloud Paint Plush Blush and our dewy gel-cream Cloud Paint, two buildable and easily-blendable formulas that can be worn on their own or together for a bolder look.
Treat your Top Shelf to two pillowy-soft formulas. Cloud Paint Plush Blush for a seamless, sunset-inspired flush and Ultralip for cushiony, nourishing lip color.

One scent, three ways to wear it. Complete with our Daily Oil Wash, Daily Perfecting Lotion and Body Spritz, this full-body trio is designed to be layered. Just cleanse, lock in moisture and finish with our lightweight hair-and-body mist. Available in two iconic scents.

Everything you need for an instant escape. Start in the shower with Daily Oil Wash for a deeply nourishing cleanse and finish with new Daily Perfecting Lotion for soft, fortified skin. Available in two iconic scents.
The ultimate on-the-go duo: Balm Dotcom for instant nourishment and Glossier You Travel Spray for fragrance touch-ups. Ideal for any handbag or makeup bag.

A perfect duo curated for a dewy glow. Apply our oil-serum hybrid, Futuredew, for a lit-from-within glow, then top off your look with Cloud Paint, our seamless, gel-cream cheek color, for a natural-looking flush or sun-hugged definition.
Two iconic Glossier products to make your routine a little more luxe. Wear them solo or layer them together for a long-lasting fragrance experience.

Everything your body needs. Four Body Hero products featuring our signature Orange Blossom Neroli scent. A line-up of Daily Oil Wash and new Daily Perfecting Lotion, now with enhanced formulas and upgraded packaging. Plus, Dry Touch Oil Mist and Exfoliating Bar.

A skin-scent enhancing fragrance duo made up of Glossier You Fleur and Glossier You. Formulated with the same warm, musky Ambrox base, both of these fragrances smell a little bit different on everyone – ideal for layering or wearing on their own.

Glossier You and Fleur are skin-scent enhancers that wear close to skin and true to you. Formulated with the same warm, musky Ambrox base, both of these fragrances smell a little bit different on everyone. Wear them together or keep Fleur at home and take Glossier You with you for touch ups.
Build the ultimate combo with Lip Line, our enhancing lip pencil, and Ultralip, our high-shine lipstick for a hint of moisturizing color.

Glossier You + Doux are skin-scent enhancers that wear close to skin and true to you. Designed to be layered and to enhance, never overpower your unique scent with the same warm, musky Ambrox + Ambrette base—which means they smell a little bit different on everyone. Keep Doux at home and take Glossier You with you for touch ups, wherever the day takes you.

Glossier You + Rêve are skin-scent enhancers that wear close to skin and true to you. Designed to be layered and to enhance, never overpower your unique scent with the same warm, musky Ambrox + Ambrette base—which means they smell a little bit different on everyone. Keep Doux at home and take Glossier You with you for touch ups, wherever the day takes you.
Treat yourself or a loved one to this ultra-nourishing duo. Because nothing says ‘I love you’ quite like our do-everything lip balm and our supercharged hand cream infused with Glossier You.
Two doses of our best-selling Lash Slick Mascara in your choice of Black, Brown, or one of each. Keep one at home and one on-the-go, so you’re never without visibly lengthened, lifted lashes.

New Boy Brow Arch shapes and defines brows with a 2-in-1 custom tip shape— a precision edge for hair-like flicks and flat edge to fill sparse areas. Pair with our legendary face-framing Boy Brow for flexible hold + a total brow look.

Like a multivitamin for your skin, this trio of serums packs hydration, glow, and clarity into one convenient set. The lightweight, fast-absorbing, never-greasy formulas with powerful (yet gentle!) ingredients are formulated for everyday use and let you customize your routine for targeted results.

A fast-absorbing, lightweight gel-cream moisturizer that balances oil without over-drying or leaving a powdery finish. Immediately, thanks to Marine Extract and Niacinamide, pores appear smaller, shine is gone, and skin is hydrated and happy—with more skin-balancing benefits over time.

A gentle makeup remover that melts away long-wearing and waterproof formulas—without needing to rub or tug the skin. The perfectly-proportioned blend of micellar water and weightless oil create a dual-phase formula that easily dissolves makeup, while Pro-Vitamin B5 conditions so your skin feels soft and fresh after use.

A luxuriously rich yet fast-absorbing face cream that delivers a surge of long-lasting hydration. The buttery texture and blend of botanical oils and glycerin melt into skin to give you a smooth, dewy finish that’s perfectly prepped for makeup.

A dual-ended eyeshadow brush specially designed to work with Monochromes, but plays nicely with other powder palettes. The shader side expertly picks up and holds just-the-right-amount of product so it’s easy to apply and build up your look. The blender side is rounded and fluffy, so it’s ideal for blending out pigment evenly all over lids and into contours and creases of the eye.
A new kind of laptop, built for reflection. Touch up on the go with this mini laptop-shaped mirror featuring our G-logo, Smile Wave and an etched mantra for a daily, portable reminder.

Drink up with our perfectly-sized water bottle. Originally created as a Glossier Seattle pop-up exclusive, our newest addition is back for good in a bigger size. Complete with our “You Look Good” mantra, this ultra-durable, lightweight, and BPA-free companion fits perfectly in your gym bag, work tote, or bike basket.
A super soft, goes-with-everything bandana for versatile wear. Made from 100% cotton and cut into a 20 inch square, this essential can be tied around your hair, bag or belt loop.

A forget-you-have-it-on finishing powder that cuts shine, blurs the appearance of pores and sets makeup. With a matte, never flat finish, you can customize your level of dewiness by blotting in targeted areas. It won’t leave you with telltale chalky residue, cake or crease into fine lines, or flatten skin’s texture.

A dual-ended, portable and retractable synthetic brush designed for our powder and gel-cream blushes. The tapered brush end is perfect for blending Cloud Paint Plush Blush. While the opposite end mimics fingertips with a soft and non-absorbent silicone tip, making it perfect for patting on Cloud Paint!

A crystal-infused highlighter (yes, literal crystals) with skin conditioning benefits that leave you glowy and glazed all day—never glittery. The solid, oil-based inner core is made from vitamin-rich moisturizers that adds a dewy finish to skin, while the “halo” outer core contains genuine powdered crystals for a lit-from-within look. Available in three universally-flattering shades that will enhance everyone’s inner glow—no need to consult a modern mystic or charge them during a full moon.

A pH-balanced gel-cream cleanser that’s suitable for all skin types. Formulated with gentle, conditioning ingredients, this cleanser dissolves dirt, oil and makeup while leaving skin soft and nourished–never stripped.
Bring a bit of our world to yours with this 10th anniversary exclusive acrylic tray. A beloved staple from our stores, it’s perfect for displaying your makeup or holding your favorite cleansing bar.

Hey there, good looking (yes, you!). Say hello to a new way to top off your confidence. Our mantra, “You Look Good,” was born during Glossier's launch in 2014. It was something we rarely heard or felt from the industry, and something we believe sincerely—that beauty is about being confident in your skin, wherever you are in your journey. The inverted tagline was intentionally designed to create little easter eggs of joy in everyday moments like walking past a mirror, or while creative-directing your own selfie session. It's a nudge to slow down, celebrate your individuality, and remind yourself that you look good.
Your blush routine, perfected. Make getting ready easier with this duo featuring Cloud Paint Plush Blush and our Cloud Paint Cheek brush. Two essentials for a seamless, sunset-inspired flush.

Each finish glides on smooth, with minimal fallout or creasing, and can be worn alone or together for monochromatic dimension and choose-your-own-adventure intensity. Matte is a rich, smooth, versatile option. Satin has a soft, delicate sheen. And metallic has a hint of sparkle for a dreamy, shimmering effect. Select your signature shade from 10 curated color stories—inspired by hues found in nature.
